title: Reverse & Clean
description:
⏱ Time: 6 mins
Part A: Reverse a sentence and remove spaces.
Part B: Swap case of characters in the reversed text.
part_a_prompt: # PART A: Write a function 'reverse_and_clean_spaces' that takes a sentence, reverses it, and removes all spaces.
part_b_prompt: # PART B: Use your partner's 'reverse_and_clean_spaces' to implement 'process_sentence(sentence)'. It should swap the case of all characters in the returned string.
